articles.title: This 275-Million-Year-Old Animal Had a Jaw So Twisted It Stumped Scientists for Years
articles.summary: Imagine a jaw where teeth point sideways instead of up! Scientists found nine fossil jaws in Brazil from a weird animal called Tanyka, which lived 275 million years ago. Its twisted jaw hints it was a plant-eater, like a prehistoric platypus.

articles.title: AI Is Getting Scarily Good at Diagnosing Tough Medical Cases—Even Better Than Doctors
articles.summary: In a new study, an AI model correctly guessed the right diagnosis almost 80% of the time, beating human doctors. The AI even spotted a dangerous flesh-eating infection 12 hours before doctors did. But experts say AI should help, not replace, real doctors.

articles.title: Why Your Online Safety Needs a Total Makeover in the Age of AI
articles.summary: AI is making computers smarter, but it's also giving hackers new ways to attack. A cybersecurity expert says we can't just add AI to old security systems—we need to rebuild security with AI at the center. Think of it like building a fortress, not just adding locks.
